title: The Patron Saint of Murderers - Ada Palmer
summary: A YouTube podcast episode from Dwarkesh Patel's channel featuring author and historian Ada Palmer discussing intellectual history, ethics, and potentially contentious historical ideas.
writeup: In this Dwarkesh Patel podcast episode, author and historian Ada Palmer discusses intellectual history, ethics, and contentious historical ideas. The conversation centers on how moral frameworks and ideas develop and shift over time, drawing on Palmer's work as a historian. The format is a long-form interview suited to readers interested in the history of thought and the ethical questions it raises.
